creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
v2.8.2 Latest
What's Changed

call: fix mnat call_streams_alloc #2242


release v2.8.1
What's Changed

    baresip.h: bump BARESIP_VERSION by @cspiel1 in #2196


release v2.8.0
What's Changed

    opensles cmake by @juha-h in #2108
    test/call: Add test_call_change_videodir by @maximilianfridrich in #2080
    cmake: bump min version to 3.10 by @alfredh in #2112
    zrtp: remove module, use gzrtp instead by @alfredh in #2109
    Avoid gzrtp compile warnings by @juha-h in #2110
    Update video in menu when UA_EVENT_CALL_REMOTE_SDP is recieved by @juha-h in #2113
    http/https requests with large body by @fAuernigg in #2100
    call: send reinvite after established handlers by @maximilianfridrich in #2117
    refer out of dialog by @cspiel1 in #2115
    remove unused functions in baresip.h by @cspiel1 in #2122
    webrtc/demo: make https optional by @sreimers in #2120
    Restored original working behavior in uag request_handler by @juha-h in #2124
    uag: out-of-dialog REFER handler checks to.tag by @cspiel1 in #2125
    Update media fixes by @cspiel1 in #2116
    account: set 100rel default to no by @cspiel1 in #2128
    avcodec: remove usage of old FFmpeg api (before 4.1.9) by @alfredh in #2126
    rtp: Improve media synchronization by @sreimers in #2129
    avformat: remove usage of old FFmpeg api by @alfredh in #2130
    i2s: remove deprecated module by @alfredh in #2131
    ci: migrate to CMake by @alfredh in #2132
    menu: during early media switch on/off ringback by @cspiel1 in #2133
    call, event, audio: send DTMF via hidden call by @cspiel1 in #2134
    ua,reg,serreg: fix serial registration mode by @cspiel1 in #2139
    CodeQL fixes by @sreimers in #2143
    cmake: set atomic-implicit-seq-cst only for C language by @sreimers in #2145
    cmake: define -Wshorten-64-to-32 C only by @sreimers in #2146
    Cmake of webrtc_aec module plus remove of unused aec.cpp var by @juha-h in #2144
    cmake: make include dir public by @sreimers in #2147
    cmake: add APP_MODULES and APP_MODULES_DIR by @sreimers in #2148
    Added cmake of gst module by @juha-h in #2149
    Improved call closed message by @juha-h in #2151
    gtk & menu: Fix potential memory leaks by @maximilianfridrich in #2153
    call: allocate streams after peer_uri was set by @cspiel1 in #2154
    dshow/cmake: fix stdc++ linking with MSVC by @sreimers in #2156
    cmake: fix MSVC library output name by @sreimers in #2157
    webrtc: add HAVE_GETOPT by @sreimers in #2158
    config: ignore dirent.h on win32 by @sreimers in #2159
    ua: do not duplicate request URI parameters by @maximilianfridrich in #2152
    cmake: add netroam module by @robert-scheck in #2170
    cmake: add portaudio module by @robert-scheck in #2173
    cmake: add jack module by @robert-scheck in #2172
    avcodec,config: add setting for keyframe interval by @cspiel1 in #2171
    cmake: add sdl module by @robert-scheck in #2174
    call: set peer URI early for incoming calls by @cspiel1 in #2168
    cmake: Add options -DDEFAULT_CAFILE="…" and -DDEFAULT_AUDIO_DEVICE="…" by @robert-scheck in #2179
    cmake: add gtk module by @robert-scheck in #2176
    cmake: add opus_multistream module by @robert-scheck in #2175
    cmake: synchronize behaviour of -DSHARE_PATH="…" with GNU Makefiles by @robert-scheck in #2180
    cmake: synchronize behaviour of -DMOD_PATH="…" with GNU Makefiles by @robert-scheck in #2181
    Move docs/COPYING to LICENSE and update content to match with re/rem by @robert-scheck in #2188
    cmake: add ABI (soname) versioning by @robert-scheck in #2187
    misc: Use example domains and IPs by @robert-scheck in #2186
    cmake: symlink modules by @sreimers in #2190
    cmake: add mpa module by @robert-scheck in #2191
    release v2.8.0 by @cspiel1 in #2193
